one_time_description: Gain on forgiveness of Treaty Loan
economic_notes: Nation operates Matchlee Limited Partnership and various BC Ltd. subsidiaries. Nuu-chah-nulth Seafood Limited Partnership disposed during the year. BC gaming revenue sharing received $380,054. Marina and tourism revenue of $236,036.
notes: Significant one-time gain of $1,839,801 from forgiveness of Treaty Loan inflates revenue and surplus. Nation consolidates 2 entities (government admin and housing programs) and uses modified equity for 7 GBEs. Funds held in trust by Government of Canada (Ottawa Trust) total $5,342,269. Short-term investments were $2,528,778 in 2019 but reduced to zero in 2020. Total government transfers estimated as Nuu-chah-nulth Tribal Council + Province of BC + First Nations Health Authority + CMHC + First Peoples Heritage + First Nations Education Steering Committee. OSR includes government business entities income, gaming, cooperation agreements, marina, interest, rental, road use permits, subsidies, licenses, contracts, and miscellaneous.
